name: Chocolate Cream Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the meringue: In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites, salt, cream of tartar, and almond extract with an electric mixer until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat at high speed until stiff peaks form. Spread the mixture onto greased and floured sheets, forming 3-6 inch circles.
2. Bake the meringue: Place the sheets in a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) and bake for 25 minutes. Remove from the cookie sheets immediately and cool on racks.
3. Assemble the torte: Stack the cooled meringue layers on a serving plate, spreading chocolate filling between each layer. If desired, sprinkle with coconut.
4. Chill the torte: Refrigerate the assembled torte for 6-8 hours before serving.
Filling:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat chocolate bits, mini marshmallows, and evaporated milk over low heat, stirring occasionally until melted.
2. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the whipping cream until thick.
4. Fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture until well combined.
